key_drivers: The dollar softened while U.S. growth expectations slowed, supporting commodities and selected FX pairs.
Crude oil is being lifted by inventory draws, tightening supply conditions, and elevated Middle East risk.
Equity index signals remain mixed as softer dollar effects are offset by wider credit spreads and firmer volatility.

stale_sources: World Gold Council gold ETF update published 2026-04-08 and based on March flows
RBA stance relies on March 2026 minutes coverage
BoJ stance relies on recent reporting because a direct article source was access-restricted
China growth signal relies on March PMI releases
